bead.title: B22d-d: execute_bead.go + execute_bead_review.go dispatch onto ResolvedConfig seam
bead.description:
Step d/h of B22d decomposition.

Migrate execute_bead.go's dispatchAgentRun (line 647 RunOptions composite, line 938 RunViaServiceWith) and execute_bead_review.go's dispatchReviewRun (line 531 RunOptions composite, line 704 RunViaServiceWith) onto a new internal seam that takes ResolvedConfig + AgentRunRuntime.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go (dispatchAgentRun)
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go (dispatchReviewRun)
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_*_test.go siblings that need updating
- New internal helper in service_run.go if needed for the seam

Out-of-scope:
- Other execute_bead changes
- service_run.go public API deletions (step h)
bead.acceptance: field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go. field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
